description_long: This mosque features a large central dome with a smooth, light-colored surface and a golden finial at its apex, dominating the main prayer hall. A single, tall minaret with a pointed spire rises adjacent to the dome, adorned with subtle decorative bands and a balcony near the top. The building's exterior walls are painted in a pale hue, with rectangular windows arranged in rows, and a prominent entrance area with a covered portico supported by columns. Mature trees and a red-tiled roofed annex are visible on the property, adding greenery and architectural contrast. The mosque's structure is primarily rectangular with a projecting entrance and side wings, and the overall design is simple yet elegant, with minimal visible ornamentation. The surrounding area includes paved walkways and landscaped elements, suggesting integration into an urban neighborhood.
description: A light-colored mosque with a large central dome, a single tall minaret, rectangular windows, and a covered entrance, surrounded by trees and a red-tiled annex.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a covered portico, the central dome, and the minaret rising behind, flanked by trees and the red-tiled annex.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the minaret's height and proximity to the dome, as well as the rear and side of the mosque with more visible greenery.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the entrance area, the arrangement of windows, and the relationship between the dome, minaret, and annex.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the side and rear of the mosque, with the dome and minaret in profile and additional trees and annex details visible.
attribute_dome: One large, smooth, light-colored dome with a golden finial, centrally placed atop the main prayer hall.
attribute_minaret: One tall, slender minaret with a pointed spire and balcony, positioned adjacent to the main dome and rising significantly above the roofline.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman, characterized by the large central dome, single tall minaret, and simple rectangular layout with minimal ornamentation.
